question_text: A book is resting on a table and is not moving. Which statement best describes the forces acting on the book?

options.label: A
options.text: The forces are unbalanced, so the book will start moving

options.label: B
options.text: The forces are balanced, so the book remains at rest

options.label: C
options.text: There are no forces acting on the book at all

options.label: D
options.text: The weight force is stronger than the normal force

explanation: When an object is at rest and stays at rest, the forces acting on it must be balanced. The weight pushing down is balanced by the normal force from the table pushing up, so the resultant force is zero. According to Newton's first law, this is why the book doesn't move.
